channel.title: WildStar on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in WildStar on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Wildstar Class Summary (Nov 2008)
item.description:
Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I’m going to do the Wild Star class summary from November 2008.

I found this file from 2008 that I created at home because I’ve mentioned in my other wstar videos that I, when I became design director, I was given 90 days to completely design all the classes for the game, because there was a big meeting in November. And I actually have It’s November 13th 2018, so that was about 90 days after I started as design director with all except for one person — all new design hires.

item.title: Why I Left Carbine's WildStar
item.description:
Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about why I left carbine Studios.

So I left in 2011, uh, end of June. It’s only the second time I ever walked away — away from a game in development, but it — WildStar, which was that game — did ship. Uh, just like the first game I walked away from ever, Fallout 2 shipped, which makes I mean I’m happy that every game I ever worked on or got paid to work on shipped, even the ones — the two — that I walked away from.
